[[the function is designed to calculate the sum of squares and the product of cubes for a given list of integers]]  
[[it takes a slice of integers as input and returns an ordered pair containing the computed values]]  
[[the first element of the pair is the sum of the squares of all elements in the list]]  
[[the second element is the product of the cubes of all elements in the list]]  
[[if the list is empty, the sum of squares is set to null and the product of cubes is set to 1]]  
[[the function handles edge cases where the list contains no elements by returning (0, 1)]]

[[source]]  
[[the function uses a loop to iterate through each element in the input list]]  
[[it calculates the square of each element and accumulates the sum of these squares]]  
[[it calculates the cube of each element and accumulates the product of these cubes]]  
[[when the list is empty, the sum of squares is initialized to 0 and the product of cubes is initialized to 1]]  
[[the function returns the computed values as an ordered pair in the format [sum, product]]  
[[the implementation ensures that the output is correctly formatted as per the required structure]]
